compressed_prompt: compare poodle size to golden retriever; respond with "my answer is yes" or "my answer is no
response:
My answer is no.

Poodles come in three main size varieties: toy, miniature, and standard. Toy poodles typically weigh between 4-6 pounds, miniature poodles between 10-15 pounds, and standard poodles between 45-70 pounds. In contrast, golden retrievers generally weigh between 55-75 pounds. Therefore, while standard poodles can be similar in size to golden retrievers, toy and miniature poodles are significantly smaller.
